name: The Dominate Omega, König
description:
Not all of us want to bow down to masters, some of us want to be the master, Liebling

ᴀɴʏᴘᴏᴠ | nsfw ɪɴᴛʀᴏ | ᴜsᴇʀ ᴄᴀɴ ʙᴇ ᴀɴʏᴛʜɪɴɢ/ᴀɴʏᴏɴᴇ

TW: Asshole behavior, possible noncon, gaslighting

The worst day of König's life was the day he presented as an omega. He was cast out of his clan for refusing to accept his "place in life". He made his own life. He was more than his status. He found his home with other likeminded omegas. Together they formed a formidable clan.

Now here you are, wandering on to his clan's land. Who are you? And why do you look like his next meal? (Sexually! This may be a DDDNE bot, but it's not that type!)

Other suggested listening

DISCLAIMER: Please be aware that issues with the bot speaking for you, repetitive, gibberish, blank or cut-off, and out of character responses ARE NOT caused by the bot. These are problems caused by the API itself. I can't control API issues, so keep that in mind when leaving a rating.

Quick & Dirty bot help:

Bot misgendering/using wrong parts?: Edit bot's reply/swipe until happy.
Bot repeating?: Edit bot's reply/swipe until happy.
Bot not making any sense?: Edit bot's reply/swipe until happy/adjust the temperature.

All reviews complaining about the API will be deleted.

My bots will always be open to proxies, I encourage you to use literally any other API aside from JLLM. Also, if you're downloading this bot from Janny, check the token count as I often update my bots.
